Resolves #5756

`MicroLoader.mjs` now imports the app-local `neo-config.json` as a JSON module using import attributes, while preserving the previous document-relative lookup semantics via `document.baseURI` before bootstrapping `mainPath`. The bootstrap docs now describe the JSON module path instead of the retired fetch/json parse path.

Evidence: L2 (static syntax, URL-resolution canary, Node JSON-module canary, and browser app bootstrap) -> L2 required (MicroLoader config import semantics and build-copy path compatibility). Residual: GitHub CI browser/lint matrix.

## Deltas from ticket

- Preserved the old `fetch('./neo-config.json')` document-relative behavior by resolving the dynamic import specifier with `new URL('./neo-config.json', document.baseURI).href`.
- Updated the bootstrap docs that explicitly described the old fetch/json parse behavior.

## Test Evidence

- `npm run agent-preflight -- src/MicroLoader.mjs learn/guides/fundamentals/ApplicationBootstrap.md learn/benefits/OffTheMainThread.md`
- `git diff --check`
- `node --check src/MicroLoader.mjs`
- `rg -n 'fetch.*neo-config|loader will fetch|Fetches the .*neo-config|Parses the JSON response' src learn apps examples buildScripts test`
- `node --input-type=module -e 'const spec = new URL("./neo-config.json", "http://127.0.0.1:9999/apps/covid/index.html").href; console.log(spec)'`
- Browser canary against `apps/covid/index.html` with a local static server: `{"mainPath":"./Main.mjs","appPath":"apps/covid/app.mjs"}`
- `rg -n "MicroLoader\\.mjs|neo-config\\.json" buildScripts/webpack/development/webpack.config.appworker.mjs buildScripts/webpack/production/webpack.config.appworker.mjs`

## Post-Merge Validation

- [ ] GitHub CI confirms PR-body lint, source lint, and test-scope jobs on the pushed branch.
- [ ] Build-output smoke check confirms served `neo-config.json` keeps an `application/json` MIME type in generated dev/prod app output.
